# diagnosis positive corpus — each line should trigger the detector
# ICD-10 codes with medical/clinical context
Diagnosis: E11.9 — Type 2 diabetes mellitus patient condition
ICD-10 code J45.901 asthma patient clinical assessment
Patient diagnosis: I10 essential hypertension medical record
Clinical diagnosis J06.9 upper respiratory infection patient
ICD code: F32.9 major depressive disorder patient diagnosis
Diagnosis M79.3 panniculitis patient rheumatology clinic
Patient condition: K21.0 GERD with esophagitis diagnosis
ICD-10 diagnosis code: N39.0 urinary tract infection patient
Medical diagnosis J18.9 pneumonia unspecified hospital patient
Condition: E78.5 hyperlipidemia patient clinical notes
ICD-10: L30.9 dermatitis unspecified patient diagnosis
Diagnosis code: Z23 immunization patient encounter clinical
Patient medical diagnosis M54.5 low back pain condition
ICD code J20.9 acute bronchitis patient clinical visit
Clinical condition: E11.65 diabetes with hyperglycemia patient
Diagnosis: G43.909 migraine unspecified patient neurology
ICD-10 code: F41.1 generalized anxiety disorder patient
Medical condition: K92.1 melena patient clinical diagnosis
Patient diagnosis: B34.9 viral infection unspecified clinical
ICD-10: M06.9 rheumatoid arthritis unspecified patient
Condition code: J44.1 COPD patient hospital admission diagnosis
Diagnosis: I25.10 coronary artery disease patient cardiology
